ConnectedApp.description: OAuth 2.0 Connected App for the PlantIQ MuleSoft integration. Used by MuleSoft Salesforce Connector to authenticate via Username-Password flow, subscribe to PlantIQ_Target_Set__e Platform Events, execute SOQL queries, upsert GWB_Productivity_Idea__c records, and call the Einstein LLM REST API.
ConnectedApp.label: PlantIQ MuleSoft Integration
